scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,api,web -c magenta,cyan,green "npm -w @rozga/shared run dev" "npm -w @rozga/api run start:dev" "npm -w @rozga/web run dev"
scripts.build: npm -w @rozga/shared run build && npm -w @rozga/api run build && npm -w @rozga/web run build
scripts.lint: npm -w @rozga/shared run lint && npm -w @rozga/api run lint && npm -w @rozga/web run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm -w @rozga/shared run typecheck && npm -w @rozga/api run typecheck && npm -w @rozga/web run typecheck
